title: dolichos callosus
intro: Dolichos callosus, also known as Horse Gram or Macrotyloma uniflorum, is a tropical legume native to India and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antidiabetic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dolichos callosus include reducing blood sugar levels, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in weight management. The herbal preparations of Dolichos callosus include decoctions, powders, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
